message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Skava Integration – Order Replaced Completed

box "Skava AWS" #LightBlue
participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SEO
end box

box "Kafka" #LightCyan
participant "Topics" as KT
end box

box "YL Services" #LightBlue
participant "Order Sync Service" as OSS
end box

database "Legacy DB" as LDB

SEO -> KT : 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message

note over KT : Async

KT -> OSS : 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message

OSS -> LDB : 3 Update order status in legacy db
LDB ..> OSS : 4 Response/Order ID

OSS -> KT : 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

note over KT : Async

KT -> SEO : 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

@enduml
```
